# Automated MLOps Pipeline with DVC, MLflow, FastAPI and Docker

## Project Overview

This project implements an end-to-end MLOps pipeline that automatically performs:

* Data Ingestion
* Data Validation
* Data Preprocessing
* Feature Engineering
* Model Training
* Model Evaluation
* Best Model Selection
* Experiment Tracking with MLflow
* Data Versioning with DVC
* FastAPI Inference Service
* Docker Containerization
* GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Tech Stack

* Python
* Scikit-Learn
* XGBoost
* LightGBM
* MLflow
* DVC
* FastAPI
* Docker
* GitHub Actions

## Pipeline

Data Ingestion

↓

Data Validation

↓

Preprocessing

↓

Feature Engineering

↓

Train/Test Split

↓

Model Training

↓

Model Evaluation

↓

Best Model Selection

↓

FastAPI Deployment

↓

Docker Containerization

## Models

* Random Forest
* XGBoost
* LightGBM

## Features

* Automated DVC Pipeline
* MLflow Experiment Tracking
* Automated Best Model Selection
* Dockerized Inference API
* CI/CD using GitHub Actions
